name: Edible Garden AG Inc
business: Edible Garden is a controlled environment agriculture farming company that offers over 140 SKUs spanning fresh produce (cut herbs, hydroponic basil, potted herbs, wheatgrass) and consumer packaged goods (sports nutrition, nutraceuticals, sauces, pickles). Its products are available in over 5,000 retail locations across the United States, the Caribbean, and South America, sold to supermarket chains and food distributors.

exposures.sentence: Edible Garden is a controlled environment agriculture ("CEA") farming company.

As of December 31, 2025, we offer more than 140 stock keeping units ("SKUs") spanning two principal product segments: (i) fresh produce, including cut herbs, hydroponic basil, potted herbs, and wheatgrass; and (ii) shelf-stable and refrigerated consumer packaged goods, including sports nutrition and nutraceuticals (Kick. and Vitamin Whey /Vitamin Way ), fermented gourmet sauces and chili-based products (Pulp ), and functional fermented pickles and sauerkraut (Pickle Party ).
Specifically, we are transitioning our Edible Garden Prairie Hills facility in Webster City, Iowa into a dedicated ready-to-drink ("RTD") and clean nutrition manufacturing hub.

We intend to integrate the patented water treatment technology across our existing CEA operations, opening new possibilities for improving agricultural efficiency and sustainability along with enhancing our capabilities to meet or exceed statutory wastewater treatment requirements where we operate.
Our operations are supported by GreenThumb , our proprietary patented greenhouse management and demand-planning software (U.S. Patent Nos. 11,158,006 B1; 11,410,249 B2; and 11,830,088 B2).

catalysts.event: Phase 1 production at Webster City RTD facility anticipated to begin
catalysts.sentence: Phase 1 production at the Webster City facility is anticipated to begin in 2027, subject to the execution of a final supply agreement with Tetra Pak, completion of engineering and installation, regulatory approvals, and adequate capital availability.
We anticipate completion of the current construction of the packhouse to be completed by the fall of 2026.

catalysts.event: Processing IOA termination deadline (if no final agreement)
catalysts.sentence: The Processing IOA will terminate automatically upon the earlier of (i) execution of a Final Agreement or (ii) April 29, 2026, unless earlier terminated by the Company.

catalysts.event: Packaging IOA termination deadline (if no final agreement)
catalysts.sentence: The Packaging IOA will terminate automatically upon the earlier of (i) execution of a Final Agreement or (ii) May 19, 2026, unless earlier terminated by the Company.

tamClaims.claim: The global RTD beverage market was valued at approximately $776 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: The Company believes that the RTD platform, if successfully developed and commercialized, represents a meaningful opportunity to expand revenue and improve margins through participation in the high-growth global RTD beverage market, which was valued at approximately $776 billion in 2024.
